section_miscategorizations.text: The patient's kidney function appears excellent.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Kidney function being characterized as 'excellent' is an interpretive clinical judgment rather than a raw objective datum; it would more typically appear in the Assessment, though its presence in Findings is not seriously misleading.

section_miscategorizations.text: I will prescribe Coreg 25 milligrams twice daily and order a lipid panel and complete metabolic panel. I will also order carvedilol 25 milligrams twice daily.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Coreg is the brand name for carvedilol; listing both as separate orders in the Plan is internally inconsistent and potentially confusing, though it is still within the correct section. This is an organizational/clarity issue rather than a section misplacement.
